channel.title: Free Tier on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Free Tier on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure DocumentDB instant free tier clusters
item.description:
Azure DocumentDB now supports generally available instant free tier cluster provisioning on Azure. The update says free tier clusters can be created with near-instant provisioning so users can start immediately.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Lakeflow Connect Free Tier now available in Azure Databricks
item.description:
Azure Databricks has launched a Lakeflow Connect Free Tier in Azure Databricks. Each workspace gets 100 free DBUs per day for ingestion from SaaS applications and databases, which is described as supporting roughly 100 million records per workspace per day.

  • Source: Azure Updates
